title: astragalus psilacanthus
intro: Astragalus psilacanthus, also known as milk vetch or white milk vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-modulating effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting respiratory function. Astragalus psilacanthus can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
